title: 写实摄影风格图
description: A realistic photograph of a whiteboard with a highly detailed {argument name="marker color" default="green"} dry-erase marker drawing of {argument name="subject" default="a samurai with a messy topknot and facial hair, h
prompt_raw: A realistic photograph of a whiteboard with a highly detailed {argument name="marker color" default="green"} dry-erase marker drawing of {argument name="subject" default="a samurai with a messy topknot and facial hair, hands clasped in prayer"}. The character is drawn in a {argument name="art style" default="detailed manga sketch"} style, shown in profile with eyes closed, wearing a traditional kimono with a katana tucked into his belt. To the left of the character, handwritten text in all-caps reads "{argument name="text line 1" default="VAGABOND"}" with "{argument name="text line 2" default="MUSASHI"}" written directly below it. The whiteboard has a glossy surface with realistic light reflections and glare on the left side, and a thin metallic frame is visible at the bottom edge, giving the impression of an authentic classroom or office environment.
prompt_preview: A realistic photograph of a whiteboard with a highly detailed {argument name="marker color" default="green"} dry-erase marker drawing of {argument name="subject" default="a samurai with a messy topknot and facial hair, h
prompt_display_cn:
案例「marker color」属于摄影写实。这是一张摄影写实类案例，重点在真实镜头感、人物/物体质感、光线、景深、环境和摄影语言。适合改成商业摄影、人像摄影、产品摄影、纪实照片或电影剧照。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A realistic photograph of a whiteboard with a highly detailed 【marker color：green】 dry-erase marker drawing of 【subject：a samurai with a messy topknot and facial hair, hands clasped in prayer】. The 角色 is drawn in a 【art 风格：detailed manga sketch】 风格, shown in profile with eyes closed, wearing a traditional kimono with a katana tucked into his belt. To the left of the 角色, handwritten text in all-caps reads "【text line 1：VAGABOND】" with "【text line 2：MUSASHI】" written directly below it. The whiteboard has a glossy surface with realistic 光线 reflections and glare on the left side, and a thin metallic frame is visible at the bottom edge, giving the impression of an authentic classroom or office environment.
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【拍摄主题】的摄影写实画面。

主体：
画面主体是【主体对象】，处于【动作/状态】，具有真实自然的细节。

场景：
背景环境为【场景地点】，包含【环境元素】，整体氛围为【氛围】。

摄影语言：
使用【镜头类型/焦段】，构图为【构图方式】，光线为【光线条件】，景深为【景深效果】。

质感要求：
皮肤/材质/物体细节真实，避免塑料感和过度磨皮。画面像真实摄影作品。

输出要求：
比例为【画面比例】，风格为【摄影风格】。
